subject: Re: from Lesley
body:
I think you can add a persoal not,, that he government threatened sarah you and nadia, unless I did some time in the palm beach county jail, and thats what i decided to do. , i should be out in about a year.


----- Original Message ----
From: lesley taylor <klesleyt@hotmail.com>
To: jeffrey epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, June 27, 2008 10:31:41 PM
Subject: from Lesley

 Jeffrey,
 
I just want you to know I'm going to miss you so very much.  I really look forward to talking to you and seeing you.  I will think of you  every day.  Please know that I am here for you in any way you need, where ever you need me.  Just let me know.  
 
If you have a moment and have thought about how you would like me to address people when they call to speak with you, please let me know.  I know I am to refer all media/journalist calls to Howard Rubenstein and I will have no comment.  When it comes to friends/business associates, I know you started to say something like:
 
"Jeffrey decided to put this PB stuff (thing) behind him..."
 
Let me know how to finish the statement or if you want me to say something else.
 
I am going to go in to the office on Monday because I feel the press release will stimulate some calls and I want to be the one there for you to handle them.
 
I know that I will be able to communicate with you via Darren.  Please let me know what I can do for you and how you wish me to handle anything/everything.
 
Take care, enjoy this weekend...
  
I will say prayers for you!  (Can't hurt??!!)
 
xxoo  Les
  

________________________________

I know that I will be able to communicate with you via Darren.  Please let me know what I can do for you and how you wish me to handle anything/everything.
 
Take care, enjoy this weekend...
 
I will say prayers for you!  (Can't hurt??!!)
